---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is not working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the error message or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [output of `node --version`, should be 20.x]
- pnpm version: [output of `pnpm --version`, should be 9+]
- Browser (if a frontend issue): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Commit or release: [e.g. 0.1.0 or a commit SHA]

## Additional context

Anything else that might help, such as relevant logs from the API console or
the contents of an `.eml` file written to `./emails`.
